_meta.note: Source of truth. All other catalogs fall back to these strings per key. Copy extracted verbatim from utils/emailTemplates.js + controllers/auth.js (2026-07-14 overhaul).

welcome.subject: Welcome to {appName}, {userName}!
welcome.heading: Welcome to {appName}
welcome.tagline: Practice languages with people who actually speak them
welcome.intro: Hi {userName}, your account is ready — you can start practicing with native speakers right now.
features: Chat with native speakers of the language you're learning
Get corrections on your messages from the community
Share moments and practice writing in your target language
Save words and phrases to your vocabulary deck

passwordChanged.subject: Your {appName} password was changed
passwordChanged.heading: Password updated
passwordChanged.intro: Hi {userName}, your {appName} password was changed on {timestamp}.
passwordChanged.allSet: If you made this change, you're all set — no action is needed.
passwordChanged.notYouText: Didn't change your password? Reset it now at {resetUrl} and contact {supportEmail}.

newLogin.subject: New sign-in to your {appName} account
newLogin.heading: New sign-in to your account
newLogin.intro: Hi {userName}, your {appName} account was just signed in to from a new device.
newLogin.wasYou: If this was you, you can ignore this email.
newLogin.notYouHtml: Don't recognize this sign-in? {resetLink} to secure your account.
newLogin.textBody: Hi {userName}, your {appName} account was just signed in to from {device} ({location}) at {timestamp}.
newLogin.notYouText: Don't recognize this sign-in? Reset your password to secure your account: {resetUrl}

deactivation21.subject: Everything you've built is still here
deactivation21.heading: Still here when you're ready
deactivation21.p1: Three weeks away. Your conversation history, vocabulary deck, and learning progress are all saved exactly where you left them.
deactivation21.p2: Language learning is a long game — it's fine to pause. Whenever you're ready to pick back up, just log in.
deactivation21.text: Hi {userName}, three weeks since your last BananaTalk session. Your account, conversations, and vocabulary are all saved. Log back in when you're ready: {url}

deactivation28.subject: One login keeps your BananaTalk account active
deactivation28.heading: Account notice
deactivation28.p1: Your account stays active with a single login. The conversations and vocabulary you've saved will be waiting.
deactivation28.text: Hi {userName}, log in once to keep your BananaTalk account active. Your saved conversations and vocabulary will be there: {url}

inactivity7.subject: Your {language} practice paused — pick up where you left off
inactivity7.subjectFallback: Your language practice paused — pick up where you left off
inactivity7.heading: It's been a week
inactivity7.p1: It's been 7 days since your last session. That's right around when new vocabulary starts to slip — but you're still in the window where one short practice brings it back.
inactivity7.p2: Easiest way in: open the AI Tutor and have a 5-minute conversation in {language}. No prep needed — just start talking.
inactivity7.p2Fallback: Easiest way in: open the AI Tutor and have a 5-minute conversation in your language. No prep needed — just start talking.
inactivity7.p3: Your saved words and open conversations will be there too.
inactivity7.text: Hi {userName}, it's been 7 days since your last BananaTalk session. Open the AI Tutor for a 5-minute {language} conversation: {url}
inactivity7.textFallback: Hi {userName}, it's been 7 days since your last BananaTalk session. Open the AI Tutor for a 5-minute conversation in your language: {url}

inactivity14.subject: Your vocabulary deck has been waiting two weeks
inactivity14.heading: Two weeks away
inactivity14.p1: Two weeks off means some of the words you saved are overdue for review. The vocabulary is still in your deck — it just needs a session to stick.
inactivity14.p2: Open your study queue and spend 10 minutes. That's enough to get back on track.
inactivity14.text: Hi {userName}, two weeks since your last session. Your vocabulary deck is waiting. Open BananaTalk: {url}

weeklyDigest.subject: Your language learning week
weeklyDigest.heading: Your week on BananaTalk
weeklyDigest.intro: Hi {userName}, here's what you did this week:
weeklyDigest.text: Hi {userName}, here's your week on BananaTalk: {wordsReviewed} words reviewed, {wordsSaved} new words saved, {messagesSent} messages with partners, {correctionsExchanged} corrections exchanged.

newFollower.subject: {followerName} started following you on {appName}
newFollower.heading: You have a new follower
newFollower.body: A new follower is a good opening for a language exchange — say hello and see if your languages match.
newFollower.text: Hi {userName}, {followerName} started following you on {appName}. A new follower is a good opening for a language exchange — say hello and see if your languages match: {url}

newMessage.subject: New message from {senderName} on {appName}
newMessage.heading: You have a new message
newMessage.intro: Hi {userName}, {senderName} sent you a message on {appName}:
newMessage.text: Hi {userName}, {senderName} sent you a message on {appName}: "{messagePreview}"

correction.subject: {correctorName} suggested a correction on {appName}
correction.heading: You received a correction
correction.intro: Hi {userName}, {correctorName} suggested a correction to one of your messages. Here's what changed:
correction.text: Hi {userName}, {correctorName} suggested a correction to one of your messages on {appName}.

vip.subject: Welcome to {appName} VIP, {userName}
vip.heading: Your VIP membership is active
vip.intro: Hi {userName}, your {appName} VIP {plan} plan is now active. Thanks for supporting {appName}.
vip.text: Hi {userName}, your {appName} VIP {plan} plan is now active. What's included: {benefits}. Your subscription is active until {date}.

promoCampaign.title: Corrections just got easier
promoCampaign.message:
You can now accept a partner's correction with a single tap, right in the chat bubble — no menus, no long-press.

Also new in this update:

• A small "Correct" button now sits under each message, so helping your partner takes one tap
• Tap "Save phrase" on any translated message to send it straight to your vocabulary deck for review

Update the app to try them in your next conversation.

reportResolution.subject: Your report has been reviewed
reportResolution.heading: Your report has been reviewed
reportResolution.p1: We've reviewed the report you submitted on {date} and taken appropriate action where warranted.
reportResolution.p2: For privacy reasons we don't share specific outcomes, but every report helps keep {appName} safe.
reportResolution.p3: Thank you for helping the community.

ban.subject: Your {appName} account has been suspended
ban.heading: Account suspended
ban.p1: Your {appName} account has been suspended following a review of reports made against it.
ban.appealHtml: If you believe this decision was made in error, contact {appealLink} with your username and we'll take another look.
ban.appealText: If you believe this decision was made in error, contact {appealEmail} with your username and we'll take another look.

unban.subject: Your {appName} account has been restored
unban.heading: Account restored
unban.p1: Good news — your {appName} account has been restored and you can log in again now.
unban.questionsHtml: If you have any questions, contact {supportLink}.
unban.questionsText: If you have any questions, contact {supportEmail}.

verificationCode.subject: Your Bananatalk verification code
verificationCode.heading: Confirm your email
verificationCode.intro: Enter this code in the Bananatalk app to verify your email address and finish creating your account:
verificationCode.ignore: If you didn't request this code, please ignore this email and no account will be created.

passwordResetCode.subject: Your Bananatalk password reset code
passwordResetCode.heading: Reset your password
passwordResetCode.intro: We received a request to reset your Bananatalk password. Enter this code in the app to choose a new one:
passwordResetCode.stillSecure: If you didn't request a password reset, your account is still secure. You can safely ignore this email.
